fields.helpText: Lab results free text value for conversion.   Note: All lower case characters entered into this field are converted to  upper case.

fields.setOfCodes: 0:Negative, Non-Reactive;1:Positive, Reactive;2:Borderline, Indeterminate;3:Test Not Performed, Qty not sufficient or other reason;5:Result cannot be translated;
fields.helpText: Numerice Translation Code that the Result will be translated to.
